author: doll-agent
content: Marked as blocked-by #343 (datetime/timedelta dtype). isnat returns true on NaT (Not-a-Time) sentinels in datetime64/timedelta64 arrays (int64::MIN), and raises TypeError on any other dtype. Without DType::DateTime64 and DType::Timedelta64 in ferray-core, there's no array type for which isnat would have meaningful semantics — implementing a Float-isnan-style alternative would diverge from NumPy's contract. Will be implemented as part of the #343 datetime work or immediately after.
